title: Module 1
content:
Affinity precipitation: Various formats, heterobifunctional ligands, use of
macro-affinity ligands, practical applications.
Membrane-based affinity separations: Chemical and physical feature of
membrane matrix, purification protocol, ligand coupling, stability of active
membranes, ligand leaching, scale-up and applications.

title: Module 2
content:
Affinity partitioning: Two-phase systems, general ways of steering the
partitioning, large scale extractions, non-protein partitioning, counter-current
distribution.
Reverse micelles for protein bioseparations: Microstructure and general
properties of reverse micelles, reverse micellar extraction, mass transfer of
protein extraction, process development, examples of applications for protein
separation.

title: Module 3
content:
Affinity chromatography: Role of affinity chromatography in protein
purification, affinity packings, characterization of packings, modelling and
design of AC columns.
Protein fusions for protein purification: Choice of host organism,
induction of expression, solubilization of recombinant proteins, vectors,
affinity purification, thrombin cleavage of fusion proteins.

title: Module 4
content:
Chiral separations: Chirality and biological systems, methods for chiral
separation- chromatographic methods, chiral detectors, non-chromatographic
methods.
Molecular imprinting: Preparation of molecular imprints, recognition in
molecular imprinted polymers, applications- chromatography, analysis.
